title: sterculia cochinchinensis
intro: Sterculia cochinchinensis, also known as the starfruit tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sterculia cochinchinensis include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol, and alleviate symptoms of various diseases such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Sterculia cochinchinensis include infusions, decoctions, and extracts that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
